name: @cairnkeep/context-fabric-workspace
description: Governed evidence, compiled knowledge, and cited context for Cairnkeep

scripts.build:tests: tsc -p packages/contracts/tsconfig.test.json --pretty false && tsc -p packages/client/tsconfig.test.json --pretty false && tsc -p packages/connector-sdk/tsconfig.test.json --pretty false && tsc -p apps/fabricd/tsconfig.test.json --pretty false
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:tests && node --test packages/contracts/test-dist/contracts.test.js packages/client/test-dist/client.test.js packages/connector-sdk/test-dist/connector-sdk.test.js apps/fabricd/test-dist/server.test.js apps/fabricd/test-dist/runtime.test.js
scripts.check: npm run check:public && npm run clean && npm run build && npm test && npm run check:packages && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high
